name: python3-dploot
title: python3-dploot
description:
Python rewrite of SharpDPAPI
Implement all the DPAPI logic of SharpDPAPI and DPAPI, usable
with a Python interpreter.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use dploot because Python rewrite of SharpDPAPI.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use dploot as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `dploot [options] [args]` as documented upstream for dploot.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair dploot with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `dploot --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
